promotion_to_verified_requires: successful GitHub Actions run of Verify Living Constitution on the same commit as HEAD
verification/ci-remote-evidence/record.json updated to that run with claimed_remote consistency
MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.json ci_provenance fields aligned to record and live verify.yml sha256
human commit of inventory + record (CI does not silently write these on success by default)

docs_only_without_protected_touch.rule: If git diff since last_remote_qualifying_commit touches no path in verification/tip-state-policy.json protected_surface_paths, escalation may remain none while tip_state_truth stays tip_pending until a new qualifying run refreshes anchors.

protected_surface_change_without_fresh_r.rule: ci_provenance.status must not be verified; escalation_state at least review_required when protected surfaces changed since last_remote_qualifying_commit and HEAD differs.

governance_chain_break.required_escalation: critical per existing enforcement and GOVERNANCE_SYSTEM_CARD

escalation_rules.condition: ci_provenance.status is verified while remote record workflow_conclusion is not success or artifact_upload_succeeded is false
escalation_rules.required_escalation: ci_provenance.status must not remain verified; use pending or blocked

escalation_rules.condition: verify_workflow_sha256 in inventory differs from live sha256 of .github/workflows/verify.yml without a fresh green run recorded after the change
regression ledger record fails schema validation
ci_provenance.status is verified while git HEAD differs from last_verified_commit or from record artifact_commit_hash
protected governance surfaces changed since last_remote_qualifying_commit without a new qualifying green remote run
escalation_rules.required_escalation: review_required or stronger; tip_state_truth must not be tip_verified until promotion
